verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est in diebus Achaz, filii Joathan, filii Oziæ, regis Juda, ascendit Rasin, rex Syriæ, et Phacee, filius Romeliæ, rex Israël, in Jerusalem, ad præliandum contra eam : et non potuerunt
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֡י בִּימֵ֣י אָ֠חָ֠ז בֶּן־יוֹתָ֨ם בֶּן־עֻזִּיָּ֜הוּ מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֗ה עָלָ֣ה רְצִ֣ין מֶֽלֶךְ־אֲ֠רָ֠ם וּפֶ֨קַח בֶּן־רְמַלְיָ֤הוּ מֶֽלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ יְר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם לַמִּלְחָמָ֖ה עָלֶ֑יהָ וְלֹ֥א יָכֹ֖ל לְהִלָּחֵ֥ם עָלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it came to pass in the days of Achaz the son of Joathan, the son of Ozias, king of Juda, that Rasin king of Syria and Phacee the son of Romelia king of Israel, came up to Jerusalem, to fight against it: but they could not prevail over it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte tapahtui Ahaksen Jotamin pojan, Ussian pojan, Juudan kuninkaan aikana, että Retsin Syrian kuningas, ja Peka Remalian poika, Israelin kuningas, vaelsivat Jerusalemiin, sotimaan sitä vastaan; mutta ei he taitaneet sitä voittaa.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass in the days of Ahaz the son of Jotham, the son of Uzziah, king of Judah, that Rezin the king of Syria, and Pekah the son of Remaliah, king of Israel, went up toward Jerusalem to war against it, but could not prevail against it.

verses.latin_vulgate: debellare eam. Et nuntiaverunt domui David, dicentes : Requievit Syria super Ephraim. Et commotum est cor ejus, et cor populi ejus, sicut moventur ligna silvarum a facie venti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֻּגַּ֗ד לְבֵ֤ית דָּוִד֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר נָ֥חָה אֲרָ֖ם עַל־אֶפְרָ֑יִם וַיָּ֤נַע לְבָבוֹ֙ וּלְבַ֣ב עַמּ֔וֹ כְּנ֥וֹעַ עֲצֵי־יַ֖עַר מִפְּנֵי־רֽוּחַ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And they told the house of David, saying: Syria hath rested upon Ephraim, and his heart was moved, and the heart of his people, as the trees of the woods are moved with the wind.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin sanottiin Davidin huoneelle: Syrialaiset luottavat Ephraimiin. Silloin vapisi hänen sydämensä ja hänen kansansa sydän, niinkuin puut vapisevat metsässä tuulesta.
verses.king_james: And it was told the house of David, saying, Syria is confederate with Ephraim. And his heart was moved, and the heart of his people, as the trees of the wood are moved with the wind.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad Isaiam : Egredere in occursum Achaz, tu et qui derelictus est Jasub, filius tuus, ad extremum aquæductus piscinæ superioris in via agri Fullonis ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר יְהֹוָה֮ אֶֽל־יְשַֽׁעְיָ֒הוּ֒ צֵא־נָא֙ לִקְרַ֣את אָחָ֔ז אַתָּ֕ה וּשְׁאָ֖ר יָשׁ֣וּב בְּנֶ֑ךָ אֶל־קְצֵ֗ה תְּעָלַת֙ הַבְּרֵכָ֣ה הָעֶלְיוֹנָ֔ה אֶל־מְסִלַּ֖ת שְׂדֵ֥ה כוֹבֵֽס׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Isaiah: Go forth to meet Achaz, thou and Jasub thy son that is left, to the conduit of the upper pool in the way of the fuller's field.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herra puhui Jesaialle: mene nyt Ahasta vastaan, sinä ja poikas SearJasub, ylimmäisen vesilammikon kanavan päähän, tiellä vanuttajakedolle.
verses.king_james: Then said the Lord unto Isaiah, Go forth now to meet Ahaz, thou, and Shear–jashub thy son, at the end of the conduit of the upper pool in the highway of the fuller’s field;

verses.latin_vulgate: et dices ad eum :   Vide ut sileas ; noli timere,  et cor tuum ne formidet  a duabus caudis titionum fumigantium istorum,  in ira furoris Rasin, regis Syriæ, et filii Romeliæ ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָמַרְתָּ֣ אֵ֠לָ֠יו הִשָּׁמֵ֨ר וְהַשְׁקֵ֜ט אַל־תִּירָ֗א וּלְבָֽבְךָ֙ אַל־יֵרַ֔ךְ מִשְּׁנֵ֨י זַנְב֧וֹת הָאוּדִ֛ים הָעֲשֵׁנִ֖ים הָאֵ֑לֶּה בׇּחֳרִי־אַ֛ף רְצִ֥ין וַאֲרָ֖ם וּבֶן־רְמַלְיָֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt say to him: See thou be quiet: fear not, and let not thy heart be afraid of the two tails of these firebrands, smoking with the wrath of the fury of Rasin king of Syria, and of the son of Romelia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sano hänelle: kavahda ja pysy alallas, älä pelkää, älköön myös sydämes vapisko näitä kahta suitsevan kekäleen päätä, Retsinin ja Syrialaisten, ja Remalian pojan vihaa.
verses.king_james: And say unto him, Take heed, and be quiet; fear not, neither be fainthearted for the two tails of these smoking firebrands, for the fierce anger of Rezin with Syria, and of the son of Remaliah.

verses.latin_vulgate: eo quod consilium inierit contra te Syria in malum,  Ephraim, et filius Romeliæ, dicentes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַ֗עַן כִּֽי־יָעַ֥ץ עָלֶ֛יךָ אֲרָ֖ם רָעָ֑ה אֶפְרַ֥יִם וּבֶן־רְמַלְיָ֖הוּ לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because Syria hath taken counsel against thee, unto the evil of Ephraim and the son of Romelia, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Että Syrialaiset ovat pitäneet pahoja juonia sinua vastaan, niin myös Ephraim ja Remalian poika, ja sanovat:
verses.king_james: Because Syria, Ephraim, and the son of Remaliah, have taken evil counsel against thee, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendamus ad Judam,  et suscitemus eum, et avellamus eum ad nos,  et ponamus regem in medio ejus filium Tabeel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַעֲלֶ֤ה בִֽיהוּדָה֙ וּנְקִיצֶ֔נָּה וְנַבְקִעֶ֖נָּה אֵלֵ֑ינוּ וְנַמְלִ֥יךְ מֶ֙לֶךְ֙ בְּתוֹכָ֔הּ אֵ֖ת בֶּן־טָֽבְאַֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Let us go up to Juda, and rouse it up, and draw it away to us, and make the son of Tabeel king in the midst thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Me tahdomme mennä ylös Juudaan, ja herättää häntä, ja jakaa sen keskenämme, ja tehdä siihen Tabealin pojan kuninkaaksi.
verses.king_james: Let us go up against Judah, and vex it, and let us make a breach therein for us, and set a king in the midst of it, even the son of Tabeal:

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Non stabit, et non erit istud ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֥ה אָמַ֖ר אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה לֹ֥א תָק֖וּם וְלֹ֥א תִֽהְיֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord God: It shall not stand, and this shall not be.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä näin sanoo Herra, Herra: ei sen pidä pysymän, eikä näin oleman.
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord God, It shall not stand, neither shall it come to pass.

verses.latin_vulgate: sed caput Syriæ Damascus,  et caput Damasci Rasin ;  et adhuc sexaginta et quinque anni,  et desinet Ephraim esse populus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י רֹ֤אשׁ אֲרָם֙ דַּמֶּ֔שֶׂק וְרֹ֥אשׁ דַּמֶּ֖שֶׂק רְצִ֑ין וּבְע֗וֹד שִׁשִּׁ֤ים וְחָמֵשׁ֙ שָׁנָ֔ה יֵחַ֥ת אֶפְרַ֖יִם מֵעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the head of Syria is Damascus, and the head of Damascus is Rasin: and within threescore and five years, Ephraim shall cease to be a people:
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan niinkuin Damasku on Syrian pää, niin pitää Retsinin oleman Damaskun pään. Ja viiden ajastajan perästä seitsemättäkymmentä, pitää Ephraimin tuleman perikatoon, niin ettei heidän enään pidä kansana oleman.
verses.king_james: For the head of Syria is Damascus, and the head of Damascus is Rezin; and within threescore and five years shall Ephraim be broken, that it be not a people.

verses.latin_vulgate: et caput Ephraim Samaria,  et caput Samariæ filius Romeliæ.  Si non credideritis, non permanebitis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרֹ֤אשׁ אֶפְרַ֙יִם֙ שֹׁמְר֔וֹן וְרֹ֥אשׁ שֹׁמְר֖וֹן בֶּן־רְמַלְיָ֑הוּ אִ֚ם לֹ֣א תַאֲמִ֔ינוּ כִּ֖י לֹ֥א תֵאָמֵֽנוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the head of Ephraim is Samaria, and the head of Samaria is the son of Romelia. If you will not believe, you shall not continue.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niinkuin Samaria on Ephraimin pää, niin pitää Remalian poika oleman Samarian pään. Jollette usko, niin ette vahvistu.
verses.king_james: And the head of Ephraim is Samaria, and the head of Samaria is Remaliah’s son. If ye will not believe, surely ye shall not be established.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et adjecit Dominus loqui ad Achaz, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּ֣וֹסֶף יְהֹוָ֔ה דַּבֵּ֥ר אֶל־אָחָ֖ז לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke again to Achaz, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui taas Ahakselle ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: Moreover the Lord spake again unto Ahaz, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Pete tibi signum a Domino Deo tuo, in profundum inferni, sive in excelsum supra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁאַל־לְךָ֣ א֔וֹת מֵעִ֖ם יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֑יךָ הַעְמֵ֣ק שְׁאָ֔לָה א֖וֹ הַגְבֵּ֥הַּ לְמָֽעְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ask thee a sign of the Lord thy God, either unto the depth of hell, or unto the height above.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pyydä sinulles merkkiä Herralta sinun Jumalaltas, taikka alhaalle syvyyteen, eli ylhäälle korkeuteen.
verses.king_james: Ask thee a sign of the Lord thy God; ask it either in the depth, or in the height above.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Achaz : Non petam, et non tentabo Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֖אמֶר אָחָ֑ז לֹא־אֶשְׁאַ֥ל וְלֹֽא־אֲנַסֶּ֖ה אֶת־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Achaz said: I will not ask, and I will not tempt the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Ahas sanoi: en ano ja en tahdo Herraa kiusata.
verses.king_james: But Ahaz said, I will not ask, neither will I tempt the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit :  Audite ergo, domus David.  Numquid parum vobis est molestos esse hominibus,  quia molesti estis et Deo meo ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֕אמֶר שִׁמְעוּ־נָ֖א בֵּ֣ית דָּוִ֑ד הַמְעַ֤ט מִכֶּם֙ הַלְא֣וֹת אֲנָשִׁ֔ים כִּ֥י תַלְא֖וּ גַּ֥ם אֶת־אֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said: Hear ye therefore, O house of David: Is it a small thing for you to be grievous to men, that you are grievous to my God also?
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin hän sanoi: kuulkaat siis te Davidin huone: vähäkö se teille on, että te ihmisiä vastoin teette, mutta myös teette minun Jumalaani vastoin?
verses.king_james: And he said, Hear ye now, O house of David; Is it a small thing for you to weary men, but will ye weary my God also?

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc dabit Dominus ipse vobis signum :  ecce virgo concipiet, et pariet filium,  et vocabitur nomen ejus Emmanuel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֠כֵ֠ן יִתֵּ֨ן אֲדֹנָ֥י ה֛וּא לָכֶ֖ם א֑וֹת הִנֵּ֣ה הָעַלְמָ֗ה הָרָה֙ וְיֹלֶ֣דֶת בֵּ֔ן וְקָרָ֥את שְׁמ֖וֹ עִמָּ֥נוּ אֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore the Lord himself shall give you a sign. Behold a virgin shall conceive, and bear a son and his name shall be called Emmanuel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden antaa itse Herra teille merkin: katso, neitsy siittää ja synnyttää pojan, sen nimi pitää kutsuttaman Immanuel.
verses.king_james: Therefore the Lord himself shall give you a sign; Behold, a virgin shall conceive, and bear a son, and shall call his name Immanuel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Butyrum et mel comedet,  ut sciat reprobare malum, et eligere bonum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶמְאָ֥ה וּדְבַ֖שׁ יֹאכֵ֑ל לְדַעְתּ֛וֹ מָא֥וֹס בָּרָ֖ע וּבָח֥וֹר בַּטּֽוֹב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall eat butter and honey, that he may know to refuse the evil, and to choose the good.
verses.finnish_biblia: Voita ja hunajaa hän syö, tietääksensä hyljätä pahaa ja valita hyvää.
verses.king_james: Butter and honey shall he eat, that he may know to refuse the evil, and choose the good.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia antequam sciat puer reprobare malum et eligere bonum,  derelinquetur terra quam tu detestaris a facie duorum regum suorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֠י בְּטֶ֨רֶם יֵדַ֥ע הַנַּ֛עַר מָאֹ֥ס בָּרָ֖ע וּבָחֹ֣ר בַּטּ֑וֹב תֵּעָזֵ֤ב הָאֲדָמָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אַתָּ֣ה קָ֔ץ מִפְּנֵ֖י שְׁנֵ֥י מְלָכֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For before the child know to refuse the evil and to choose the good, the land which thou abhorrest shall be forsaken of the face of her two kings.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ennenkuin poikainen oppii hylkäämään pahaa ja valitsemaan hyvää, pitää se maa, jotas kauhistut, kahdelta kuninkaalta hyljättämän.
verses.king_james: For before the child shall know to refuse the evil, and choose the good, the land that thou abhorrest shall be forsaken of both her kings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adducet Dominus super te, et super populum tuum,  et super domum patris tui,  dies qui non venerunt  a diebus separationis Ephraim a Juda,  cum rege Assyriorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָבִ֨יא יְהֹוָ֜ה עָלֶ֗יךָ וְעַֽל־עַמְּךָ֮ וְעַל־בֵּ֣ית אָבִ֒יךָ֒ יָמִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹא־בָ֔אוּ לְמִיּ֥וֹם סוּר־אֶפְרַ֖יִם מֵעַ֣ל יְהוּדָ֑ה אֵ֖ת מֶ֥לֶךְ אַשּֽׁוּר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord shall bring upon thee, and upon thy people, and upon the house of thy father, days that have not come since the time of the separation of Ephraim from Juda with the king of the Assyrians.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herra antaa sinun, sinun kansas ja isäs huoneen päälle tulla, Assyrian kuninkaan kautta, ne päivät, jotka ei sitte tulleet ole, kuin Ephraim erkani Juudasta.
verses.king_james: The Lord shall bring upon thee, and upon thy people, and upon thy father’s house, days that have not come, from the day that Ephraim departed from Judah; even the king of Assyria.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa : sibilabit Dominus  muscæ quæ est in extremo fluminum Ægypti,  et api quæ est in terra Assur ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה ׀ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֗וּא יִשְׁרֹ֤ק יְהֹוָה֙ לַזְּב֔וּב אֲשֶׁ֥ר בִּקְצֵ֖ה יְאֹרֵ֣י מִצְרָ֑יִם וְלַ֨דְּבוֹרָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֖ר בְּאֶ֥רֶץ אַשּֽׁוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it shall come to pass in that day, that the Lord shall hiss for the fly, that is in the uttermost parts of the rivers of Egypt, and for the bee that is in the land of Assyria.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtuu, että Herra viheltää sinä päivänä kärpäsiä Egyptin virtain äärestä, ja kimalaisia Assurin maalta;
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, that the Lord shall hiss for the fly that is in the uttermost part of the rivers of Egypt, and for the bee that is in the land of Assyria.

verses.latin_vulgate: et venient, et requiescent omnes  in torrentibus vallium,  et in cavernis petrarum,  et in omnibus frutetis, et in universis foraminibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָ֨אוּ וְנָח֤וּ כֻלָּם֙ בְּנַחֲלֵ֣י הַבַּתּ֔וֹת וּבִנְקִיקֵ֖י הַסְּלָעִ֑ים וּבְכֹל֙ הַנַּ֣עֲצוּצִ֔ים וּבְכֹ֖ל הַנַּהֲלֹלִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall come, and shall all of them rest in the torrents of the valleys, and in the holes of the rocks, and upon all places set with shrubs, and in all hollow places.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että he tulevat ja sioittavat kaikki tyynni itsensä hävinneihin laaksoihin, ja kiven rakoihin, ja kaikkiin mättäisiin ja pensaisiin.
verses.king_james: And they shall come, and shall rest all of them in the desolate valleys, and in the holes of the rocks, and upon all thorns, and upon all bushes.

verses.latin_vulgate: In die illa radet Dominus  in novacula conducta in his qui trans flumen sunt,  in rege Assyriorum,  caput et pilos pedum,  et barbam universam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֡וּא יְגַלַּ֣ח אֲדֹנָי֩ בְּתַ֨עַר הַשְּׂכִירָ֜ה בְּעֶבְרֵ֤י נָהָר֙ בְּמֶ֣לֶךְ אַשּׁ֔וּר אֶת־הָרֹ֖אשׁ וְשַׂ֣עַר הָרַגְלָ֑יִם וְגַ֥ם אֶת־הַזָּקָ֖ן תִּסְפֶּֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: In that day the Lord shall shave with a razor that is hired by them that are beyond the river, by the king of the Assyrians, the head and the hairs of the feet, and the whole beard.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin Herra ajelee pään ja karvat jaloista, ja ottaa pois parran palkatulla partaveitsellä, niiden kautta, jotka sillä puolella virtaa ovat, Assyrian kuninkaan kautta.
verses.king_james: In the same day shall the Lord shave with a razor that is hired, namely, by them beyond the river, by the king of Assyria, the head, and the hair of the feet: and it shall also consume the beard.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa :  nutriet homo vaccam boum, et duas oves,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֖ה בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֑וּא יְחַיֶּה־אִ֛ישׁ עֶגְלַ֥ת בָּקָ֖ר וּשְׁתֵּי־צֹֽאן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it shall come to pass in that day, that a man shall nourish a young cow, and two sheep.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siihen aikaan pitää yhden miehen yhtä lehmää ja kahta lammasta kaitseman,
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, that a man shall nourish a young cow, and two sheep;

verses.latin_vulgate: et præ ubertate lactis  comedet butyrum ;  butyrum enim et mel manducabit  omnis qui relictus fuerit in medio terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה מֵרֹ֛ב עֲשׂ֥וֹת חָלָ֖ב יֹאכַ֣ל חֶמְאָ֑ה כִּֽי־חֶמְאָ֤ה וּדְבַשׁ֙ יֹאכֵ֔ל כׇּל־הַנּוֹתָ֖ר בְּקֶ֥רֶב הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And for the abundance of milk he shall eat butter: for butter and honey shall every one eat that shall be left in the midst of the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja saaman niin paljon rieskaa, että hän saa syödä voita; sillä se joka jää maahan, saa voita ja hunajaa syödä.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass, for the abundance of milk that they shall give he shall eat butter: for butter and honey shall every one eat that is left in the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa : omnis locus ubi fuerint  mille vites, mille argenteis,  in spinas et in vepres erunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא יִהְיֶ֣ה כׇל־מָק֗וֹם אֲשֶׁ֧ר יִֽהְיֶה־שָּׁ֛ם אֶ֥לֶף גֶּ֖פֶן בְּאֶ֣לֶף כָּ֑סֶף לַשָּׁמִ֥יר וְלַשַּׁ֖יִת יִהְיֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it shall come to pass in that day, that every place where there were a thousand vines, at a thousand pieces of silver, shall become thorns and briers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä siihen aikaan tapahtuu, että kussa nyt on tuhannen viinapuuta, jotka maksavat tuhannen hopiapenninkiä, siellä pitää orjantappurat ja ohdakkeet oleman.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, that every place shall be, where there were a thousand vines at a thousand silverlings, it shall even be for briers and thorns.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum sagittis et arcu ingredientur illuc :  vepres enim et spinæ erunt in universa terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּחִצִּ֥ים וּבַקֶּ֖שֶׁת יָ֣בוֹא שָׁ֑מָּה כִּֽי־שָׁמִ֥יר וָשַׁ֖יִת תִּֽהְיֶ֥ה כׇל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: With arrows and with bows they shall go in thither: for briers and thorns shall be in all the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinne mennään nuolella ja joutsella; sillä koko maassa pitää oleman orjantappurat ja ohdakkeet;
verses.king_james: With arrows and with bows shall men come thither; because all the land shall become briers and thorns.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omnes montes qui in sarculo sarrientur,  non veniet illuc terror spinarum et veprium :  et erit in pascua bovis, et in conculcationem pecoris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכֹ֣ל הֶהָרִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר בַּמַּעְדֵּר֙ יֵעָ֣דֵר֔וּן לֹא־תָב֣וֹא שָׁ֔מָּה יִרְאַ֖ת שָׁמִ֣יר וָשָׁ֑יִת וְהָיָה֙ לְמִשְׁלַ֣ח שׁ֔וֹר וּלְמִרְמַ֖ס שֶֽׂה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And as for the hills that shall be raked with a rake, the fear of thorns and briers shall not come thither, but they shall be for the ox to feed on, and the lesser cattle to tread upon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ettei taideta tulla kaikkiin niihin mäkiin, joita lapiolla kaivetaan, orjantappurain, mätästen ja ohdakkeiden tähden; vaan härjät annetaan siinä käydä, ja lampaat sitä tallata.
verses.king_james: And on all hills that shall be digged with the mattock, there shall not come thither the fear of briers and thorns: but it shall be for the sending forth of oxen, and for the treading of lesser cattle.
